title: elaphoglossum nitidum
intro: Elaphoglossum nitidum, also known as shining elaphoglossum or shining lycopodium, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum nitidum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Elaphoglossum nitidum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
